message:
🐛 Fix Firefox/mobile nightly Playwright failures

- Change test-token → demo-token in Sidebar, Tour, navbar-responsive
  setup functions so auth resolves instantly without /api/me fetch.
  DEMO_TOKEN_VALUE sentinel causes setDemoMode() to run synchronously.
- Fix navbar xl vs lg breakpoint: Navbar uses hidden xl:flex (1280px)
  not hidden lg:flex (1024px). Update viewport 1025→1281 and CSS class
  selectors accordingly in navbar-responsive tests.
- Fix Login mobile: sidebar-primary-nav hidden on mobile viewports,
  check dashboard-page instead in detects-demo-mode test.
- Fix Clusters setup: wait for clusters-page testid (20s) not #root
  which is always present before React renders anything.
- Increase Dashboard test timeouts 15s→30s for kc-demo-mode=false
  tests that need real auth + lazy-load on Firefox CI.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
